title: exostema coriaceum
intro: Exostema coriaceum, also known as the wild coffee or Jamaican wild coffee, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, as well as the Caribbean. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Exostema coriaceum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to create remedies for a range of health conditions.
